rerun_policy.cadence: nightly for every newly certified model with configured CI credentials

status_definitions.certified: Reviewed live result meets certified tier thresholds and is fresh for this corpus version.
status_definitions.provisional: Reviewed live result meets provisional tier thresholds and is fresh for this corpus version.
status_definitions.uncertified: No reviewed live result exists, or the reviewed result does not meet provisional thresholds.
status_definitions.expired: A prior reviewed result exists but is stale or tied to an older corpus version.
status_definitions.review-needed: Runner output exists but requires human review before publication.

notes: Deterministic dry-run output is framework smoke evidence only; it is never a live model certification.
The initial public index is intentionally empty until provider-backed results are generated with operator-approved credentials and reviewed.
